prompt: Layer 2 passes (API returns 5 users from GET /api/users). Layer 3 (frontend): frontend loads but shows empty list (0 users). What's the root cause and how do I diagnose?
expected_output: API works (returns 5), frontend has the bug. Likely causes: (1) Frontend uses mock/cached data instead of real API, (2) Fetch URL points to wrong endpoint, (3) Response parsing broken. Diagnose: (1) Check browser DevTools Network tab—does GET /api/users fire? (2) Check response body—do you see 5 user records? (3) Check JavaScript console for errors. Capture evidence: Network tab screenshot, API response JSON, console errors.
